category_sources: source_facts.description says D-Bus provides inter-application communication; freedesktop D-Bus page describes it as a message bus system for applications to talk to one another.
display_name_sources: Official freedesktop page uses D-Bus; source_facts.name is dbus.
docs_sources: Official freedesktop page links D-Bus documentation; official dbus.freedesktop.org hosts the D-Bus specification and API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official freedesktop D-Bus page says the reference implementation is in the dbus/dbus project on freedesktop.org GitLab.
tags_sources: freedesktop D-Bus page describes system and session daemons, message passing, and interprocess communication; source_facts.executables lists dbus-daemon and related CLI tools.
